routing_metadata.handoff_behavior: If routed from the parent symptom, skip generic router questions and continue with complaint-specific core characterization.

start_sequence_contract.default_rule: Run the complaint-defined start sequence, then follow question_schedule.default_profile in listed order unless an explicit alternate profile is selected.

primary_mode.rationale: Abdominal pain requires thorough characterization and red‑flag screening. Increased budget to ensure critical followup and high priority questions are asked before modules.

secondary_mode.selection_rule: If this complaint is secondary, ask only the listed priority questions unless a red-flag branch activates or unresolved shared danger concepts remain.

reallocation_rules: If urgent red flags are active, borrow from extended_characterize and high_priority_followup before borrowing from context history.
If the complaint is secondary and no danger trigger is active, remain within secondary_question_budget.

profile_switch_rules.trigger: No alternate complaint-specific profile is active

presenting_complaint_narrative.text: Please tell me briefly what brought you in today and how this started.

onset.text: When did the pain start? If you can, tell me whether that was minutes, hours, days, weeks, months, or years ago.

timing.text: Is the pain constant or does it come and go?

duration.text: Please answer in one of these formats: "constant for [time]" or "comes and goes; each episode lasts about [time]".

severity.text: How severe is it from 0 to 10?

character.text: How would you describe it—sharp, cramping, burning, pressure, or something else?

course.text: Overall since it started, which best fits it now: getting worse, getting better, or staying about the same?

radiation.text: Does the pain travel anywhere else?

radiation_details.text: Where does it travel — for example to the back, groin, shoulder, or chest?

aggravating_factors.text: Is there anything that makes the pain worse?

aggravating_factors_details.text: What specifically makes it worse — for example eating, fatty or greasy food, alcohol, movement, coughing, urination, or bowel movements?

relieving_factors.text: Is there anything that makes the pain better?

relieving_factors_details.text: What specifically makes it better — for example rest, food, antacids, passing stool, or changing position?

functional_impact.text: What does it stop you from doing?

associated_symptoms.text: Have any other symptoms come with the pain?

associated_symptoms_details.text: What other symptoms have come with the pain?

severe_constant_pain.text: Has the pain stayed continuously severe without easing off, rather than coming and going?

severe_constant_pain_details.text: How long has it been severe and constant?

persistent_vomiting.text: Any repeated vomiting or inability to keep fluids down?

persistent_vomiting_details.text: How many times have you vomited? Can you keep any fluids down?

pain_out_of_proportion.text: Is the pain extremely severe or much worse than you would expect?

pain_out_of_proportion_details.text: Can you describe how severe it feels compared to the physical signs?

recent_change_in_pattern.text: Has the pain or any associated symptom changed noticeably in the last few weeks?

recent_change_in_pattern_details.text: What has changed – pain severity, frequency, or any new symptoms?

blood_in_stool.text: Any fresh blood in the stool?

blood_in_stool_details.text: Is it bright red, dark, or mixed into the stool? How much?

abdominal_distension.text: Is the abdomen swollen or distended?

abdominal_distension_details.text: How long has it been swollen? Does it come and go?

unable_to_pass_stool_or_flatus.text: Have you stopped passing stool or gas?
unable_to_pass_stool_or_flatus.ui_label: Unable to pass stool or flatus

unable_to_pass_stool_or_flatus_details.text: When was the last time you passed stool or gas?

syncope_or_collapse.text: Any fainting or near collapse with the pain?

syncope_or_collapse_details.text: How long were you out? Did you have any warning?

pulsatile_mass_or_tearing_to_back.text: Any tearing pain to the back or a pulsing feeling in the abdomen?

pulsatile_mass_or_tearing_to_back_detail.text: Where do you feel the tearing or pulsing? When did it start?

pregnancy_context.text: Could you be pregnant now, or are you recently postpartum?

pregnancy_context_details.text: How far along are you, or how many weeks postpartum?

atrial_fibrillation_or_vascular_history.text: Any history of atrial fibrillation, vascular disease, or previous clots?

atrial_fibrillation_or_vascular_history_.text: What condition? When was it diagnosed?

migratory_pain_to_rlq.text: Did the pain start near the middle and move to the right lower abdomen?
migratory_pain_to_rlq.ui_label: Migratory pain to right lower abdomen

migratory_pain_to_rlq_details.text: When did it move? How long did the central pain last before moving?

loss_of_appetite_details.text: Since when? Have you lost any weight?

diarrhea_details.text: Watery or bloody? How many times per day?

constipation_details.text: How often do you go now? Any straining?

dysuria.text: Any burning when you pass urine?

dysuria_details.text: At the start or end of urination?

hematuria_details.text: Is it visible to the naked eye? At the start, end, or throughout?

vaginal_bleeding_details.text: How much? Is it between periods or after sex?

food_exposure.text: Did this start after unusual, spoiled, undercooked, or restaurant food?

prior_episodes.text: Have you had episodes like this before?

prior_episodes_details.text: What was the diagnosis or cause, and when did it happen?

prior_abdominal_surgery.text: Any abdominal surgery or hernia history?

weight_loss.text: Any unintentional weight loss or poor appetite?

trauma_history.text: Any recent blunt or penetrating abdominal trauma?

dark_urine_details.text: Tell me more about the dark urine — when it started, how bad, what makes it better or worse.

fever_details.text: Tell me more about the fever — when it started, how bad, what makes it better or worse.

hematemesis_details.text: Tell me more about the vomiting blood — when it started, how bad, what makes it better or worse.

jaundice.text: Any yellowing of the eyes or skin?

jaundice_details.text: Tell me more about the jaundice — when it started, how bad, what makes it better or worse.

melena_details.text: Tell me more about the melena — when it started, how bad, what makes it better or worse.

rigors_details.text: Tell me more about the rigors — when it started, how bad, what makes it better or worse.

urinary_frequency.text: Are you passing urine more often than usual?

urinary_frequency_details.text: Tell me more about the urinary frequency — when it started, how bad, what makes it better or worse.

urinary_urgency.text: Any sudden urges to pass urine?

urinary_urgency_details.text: Tell me more about the urinary urgency — when it started, how bad, what makes it better or worse.

bowel_pattern_change.text: Have your bowel movements changed recently — going more or less often than usual?

bowel_pattern_change_details.text: Tell me more — when, how long, how bad, anything that makes it better or worse.

targeted_ros_plan.policy_note: Finish unresolved concepts in the pathological system before borrowing from cross-system ROS.
